title: The Delhi School Education Act, 1973
full_text: The Delhi School Education Act, 1973 दिल्‍ली विद्यालय शिक्षा अधिनियम, 1973 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197318 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1973-04-09 Act Year: 1973 Short Title: The Delhi School Education Act, 1973 Hindi Title: दिल्‍ली विद्यालय शिक्षा अधिनियम, 1973 Long Title: An Act to provide for better organisation and development of school education in the Union territory of Delhi and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 28-04-1973 Notification: 28th April, 1973, vide notification of the Delhi Administration in the Education Deptt. No. F. 5/15/72-Education dated 28th April, 1973, in respect of the provisions except Chapters II to V (both inclusive), sections 16, 17, 18, 22 and 27). 31st December, 1973, vide notification No. F. 5/15/72-Education (i), dated 31st December, 1973, Delhi Gazette, Extraordinary, Pt. IV, dated 31st December, 1973, in respect of Chapters II to V (both inclusive), sections, 16, 17, 18, 22 and 27.
